title: Fancier Mansions
description: Gives Woodland Mansions an upgraded look while keeping the vanilla gameplay features.
body:
Fancier Mansions is a datapack that replaces all of the vanilla structure segments of a Woodland Mansion with visually upgraded ones. 

The goal was to give the mansion a more detailed aesthetic while still retaining a vanilla feel as well as the vanilla gameplay. The overall block palette has been darkened, and almost every segment has been further detailed to be more atmospheric and add a bit more context to the purpose of each room.

Since this pack only replaces structure files, you should be able to add it to most existing worlds without issue (Old mansions will not update. You will need to discover new ones in newly generated chunks).
